global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting the NeonCast app with a focus on trending content.

elements.label: Abstract blue background
elements.description: A smooth gradient blue background with abstract shapes in lighter and darker shades.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large circular shape and a rectangular shape in the center, both in varying shades of blue.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional geometric shapes overlaying the main subject, adding depth and interest.

elements.label: Layered shapes
elements.description: More layered geometric shapes that enhance the visual complexity of the ad.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The text 'NeonCast' in bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A simple right-facing arrow icon indicating action, placed near the center.

elements.label: Unidentified element
elements.description: A small, abstract shape that does not convey a clear meaning.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: The text 'Watch what's trending Cancel anytime' in a clear, readable font at the bottom.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The bold text 'NeonCast' at the top, designed to grab attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button text 'Start now' in a rounded rectangle, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
